items.project_definition: A RESTful interface versioned under /api/v1/ that utilizes a consistent envelope comprising data, meta, and errors fields.
The httpx non-blocking requester used within pytest to validate business logic and endpoints.
The mandatory data interchange format for all network responses.
Security tokens with a 15-minute validity period for access and a 7-day period for refreshing sessions.
The exclusive mechanism for executing database queries to ensure all persistence logic remains asynchronous.
The relational database version 16 used for both production and non-mocked testing environments.
The mandatory runtime environment for all backend implementation and SDK integration.
The official Python library utilized for transactional email delivery via an external service.
The raw query language which is strictly forbidden for direct use in the codebase.
The asynchronous toolkit providing the interface for object-relational mapping and session management.
